name: eslint-plugin-performance-rules
description: ESLint plugin to detect performance anti-patterns

scripts.test: node tests/no-await-in-loop.test.js && node tests/no-sync-in-loop.test.js && node tests/no-large-json-parse-in-loop.test.js && node tests/no-quadratic-loops.test.js && node tests/react-no-inline-object-creation.test.js && node tests/no-regex-in-loop.test.js && node tests/no-dom-query-in-loop.test.js && node tests/prefer-map-over-reduce.test.js && node tests/no-object-spread-in-loop.test.js && node tests/no-console-in-production.test.js
